summary: Comprehensive testing of Haruf Andar/Bahar betting feature completed. All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bets/batch accepts bet_type 'haruf_andar' with single digit (0-9)
Backend: POST /api/bets/batch accepts bet_type 'haruf_bahar' with single digit (0-9)
Backend: haruf_andar and haruf_bahar reject two-digit numbers
Backend: haruf_andar and haruf_bahar have 9x multiplier (verified: 100 * 9 = 900)
Backend: All digits 0-9 are valid for haruf bets
Backend: Minimum ₹10 validation works for haruf bets
Backend: Result declaration includes haruf_andar and haruf_bahar winner counts
Frontend: Haruf Andar/Bahar section visible below Jantri grid
Frontend: Andar panel shows 0-9 with blue highlighting when amount set
Frontend: Bahar panel shows 0-9 with orange highlighting when amount set
Frontend: Haruf quick amount buttons (₹10, ₹50, ₹100, ₹200, ₹500) work independently
Frontend: Clicking number sets quick amount correctly
Frontend: Custom amount can be typed directly in input
Frontend: Clear haruf button removes all andar/bahar amounts
Frontend: Summary bar shows combined totals (jantri + haruf)
Frontend: Combined bet count correct (jodi + haruf_andar + haruf_bahar)
Frontend: Place bet button disabled when betting is closed (time-based lock)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend BET_TYPES correctly includes haruf_andar and haruf_bahar with 9x multiplier
Backend batch bet validation correctly handles single digit for haruf types
Backend result declaration correctly identifies haruf winners (andar=first digit, bahar=second digit)
Frontend correctly calculates combined totals for jodi (90x) and haruf (9x) bets
All data-testid attributes present for Haruf UI elements
Blue/orange color highlighting correctly applied based on bet type
seed_data_creation: Used existing jantri@test.com user from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Haruf Andar/Bahar feature fully tested. Backend POST /api/bets/batch accepts bet_type 'haruf_andar' and 'haruf_bahar' with single digit numbers (0-9). Multiplier is 9x. Result declaration: if jodi=57, andar winners are bets on '5', bahar winners on '7'. Frontend GamePage.js has Haruf section with data-testid='haruf-andar-{0-9}' and data-testid='haruf-bahar-{0-9}' for number buttons, data-testid='haruf-andar-amount-{0-9}' and data-testid='haruf-bahar-amount-{0-9}' for inputs. Haruf quick amounts use data-testid='haruf-quick-amt-{10|50|100|200|500}'. Clear button uses data-testid='clear-haruf-bets'. Blue highlighting for andar, orange for bahar.
